name: Erick
description:
He's not as seductive as Keith, or even as stupid as him. But he's certainly the cutest, clumsiest perv you'll ever meet. And look at him? He seems to enjoy dragging you into his problems.

**Anypov**
---
***This is my bot [Keith's](https://janitorai.com/characters/985810b6-fca0-4407-becf-fadf5b7fb45c_character-keith) first friend. I'm not going to post Yuri now, because I really don't want to post him in the midst of all the errors that are happening with janitor.
